Class Mage

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.Character
logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Attackable, AttackAnimation, Damageable, HandleOwnWeapon, SpawnAttack, UsesAmmo
public class Mage extends RangedClass implements SpawnAttack, HandleOwnWeapon
Mage ranged character that throws tarot-card projectiles with random effects.

  • Field Summary

    atk, attackFrames, attackRange, attackSpeed, attackState, buff, def, finished, FRAME_DURATION, frameIndex, hp, lastFrameTime, maxHp, name, origin, skillState, totalFrames

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    attack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player player)
    Not used directly; ranged attacks should be routed via tryAttack.
    AttackData
    getAttackData()
    Mage uses projectile attack model, so melee attack data is unused.
    boolean
    isAttackFinished()
    Completion is controlled by ranged base state.
    void
    reload()
    Performs reload and plays Mage-specific reload SFX.
    void
    resetBuff()
    Mage heal skill has no additional reset behavior.
    void
    setupAttackFrame(int totalFrame)
    Not used for Mage projectile attacks.
    protected void
    spawnRangedAttack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player p)
    Spawns tarot projectile and applies card-specific effects before firing.
    void

    Delegates start behavior to ranged base class.
    void
    useSpecialSkill()
    Mage skill heals by buff amount.

  • Method Details

    • attack

      public void attack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player player)
      Not used directly; ranged attacks should be routed via tryAttack.
      Specified by:
      attack in class Character
      Parameters:
      startX - spawn X
      startY - spawn Y
      facingRight - facing direction
      player - owning player

    • getAttackData

      public AttackData getAttackData()
      Mage uses projectile attack model, so melee attack data is unused.
      Specified by:
      getAttackData in class Character
      Returns:
      null

    • spawnRangedAttack

      protected void spawnRangedAttack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player p)
      Spawns tarot projectile and applies card-specific effects before firing.
      Specified by:
      spawnRangedAttack in class RangedClass
      Parameters:
      startX - spawn X
      startY - spawn Y
      facingRight - facing direction
      p - owning player

      Overrides:

      Returns:
